<!-- AUTO-GENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. Regenerated by `python scripts/build_operations_index.py`. -->

# Operations

Auto-generated from `hpc-agent capabilities`. Run `uv run python scripts/build_operations_index.py` after editing any primitive frontmatter; the script subprocess-calls the CLI and parses the same JSON envelope an external agent would get at runtime, so this page is provably in sync with runtime introspection.

**142 operations total**: 115 primitive atoms + 27 workflow atoms.

## How to read this page

Every operation in `hpc-agent` is a CLI atom or a Python-only primitive that emits the same `{ok, data, error_code}` envelope shape (see `docs/reference/cli-spec.md`). Workflow atoms compose primitive atoms but are externally indistinguishable from primitives ‚Äî that's the Composite property that makes higher-level workflows like campaigns work.

**Composability rule**: any operation can invoke any other operation by shelling to its CLI form (or importing its Python form). Higher-level workflows (e.g. `submit-flow ‚Üí monitor-flow ‚Üí aggregate-flow` chained by a campaign loop) are just operations that invoke other operations.

**Discoverability**: `hpc-agent capabilities` returns this same catalog at runtime in `data.operations`. Agents that don't have access to this page can introspect the framework via that subprocess call.

## `submit` (1)

Records a new submission (sidecar write + journal entry).

| Operation | Idempotent | Side effects | CLI | Python | Input schema | Output schema |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [`submit-spec`](../primitives/submit-spec.md) | ‚úì | scheduler-submit; writes-journal | `hpc-agent submit --spec <path> [--experiment-dir <dir>] [--dry-run]` | `_(none)_` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## `workflow` (27)

End-to-end pipelines composing other primitives. Same envelope shape as primitives ‚Äî indistinguishable to higher-level callers (the Composite property).

|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [`aggregate-check`](../primitives/aggregate-check.md) | ‚úì | ssh | `hpc-agent aggregate-check --spec <path> [--experiment-dir <dir>]` | `_(none)_` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
